texto: Wasnt it more important to be loyal to what was right or to those people you knew and cared about? What was the good of killing people or being hateful to them because someone you didn't know was doing something hateful to someone ekse you didn't know?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Janet Lunn que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Wasnt it more important to be loyal to what was right or to those people you knew and cared about…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, hate, home, com foco em home e point.
